title: The RealReal (REAL) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Stock analysis of The RealReal (REAL) forecasts continued growth momentum through 2026 and beyond. Analyst consensus price target of $18.19 implies significant upside from current trading levels, with 9 Wall Street analysts covering the stock uniformly bullish. Key forecast drivers: (1) continued luxury resale market expansion at 7%+ CAGR through 2030, growing to $13B+ market, (2) supply-led growth through retail store expansion and partnership networks, (3) operational leverage from AI automation and fixed cost absorption, (4) margin expansion from Athena system achieving 50%+ item processing, (5) average order value growth reflecting premium positioning. Consensus revenue forecast for 2026: $770M-$784M (11%-13% growth). Consensus adjusted EBITDA forecast: $59M-$67M (8%+ margin). Long-term EBITDA margin trajectory expected to reach 10%+ as Athena achieves greater penetration and automation benefits scale. Primary risks to forecast: (1) economic slowdown impacting luxury spending, (2) competition from ThreadUp and eBay in resale, (3) execution risk on supply unlocking initiatives, (4) technology/AI development delays. However, management has demonstrated strong execution across financial targets, with supply and margin expansion metrics ahead of historical guidance. Analyst sentiment remains constructive on the company's secular growth opportunity and path to sustainable profitability.
